initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT aCL IgG, aCL IgM, aCL IgA
FROM Examination
WHERE ID = (
    SELECT ID 
    FROM Patient 
    WHERE Diagnosis = 'SLE' 
    AND First Date = '1994-02-19'
)
AND Examination Date <= '1993-11-12'
ORDER BY Examination Date DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.aCL IgG, e.aCL IgM, e.aCL IgA
FROM Examination e
JOIN Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
WHERE p.ID = (
    SELECT ID 
    FROM Patient 
    WHERE Diagnosis = 'SLE' AND First Date = '1994-02-19'
)
AND e.Examination Date <= '1993-11-12'
ORDER BY e.Examination Date DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT aCL IgG, aCL IgM, aCL IgA
FROM Examination
WHERE ID = (
    SELECT ID 
    FROM Patient 
    WHERE Diagnosis = 'SLE' 
    AND First Date = '1994-02-19'
)
AND Examination Date <= '1993-11-12'
ORDER BY Examination Date DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT aCL IgG, aCL IgM, aCL IgA
FROM Examination
WHERE ID = (
    SELECT ID
    FROM Patient
    WHERE Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%'
    AND ID IN (
        SELECT ID
        FROM Examination
        WHERE Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%'
        AND Examination Date = '1994-02-19'
    )
)
AND Examination Date <= '1993-11-12'
ORDER BY Examination Date DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT aCL IgG, aCL IgM, aCL IgA
FROM Examination
WHERE ID = (
    SELECT ID
    FROM Patient
    WHERE Diagnosis = 'SLE'
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM Examination e2
        WHERE e2.ID = Patient.ID
        AND e2.Diagnosis = 'SLE'
        AND e2.Examination Date = '1994-02-19'
    )
)
AND Examination Date <= '1993-11-12'
ORDER BY Examination Date DESC
LIMIT 1;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT "aCL IgG", "aCL IgM", "aCL IgA"
FROM Examination
WHERE ID = (
    SELECT ID 
    FROM Patient 
    WHERE Diagnosis = 'SLE' 
    AND "First Date" = '1994-02-19'
)
AND "Examination Date" <= '1993-11-12'
ORDER BY "Examination Date" DESC
LIMIT 1;
